Get involved

Come build
with us.

No experience needed — just a willingness to show up. We build most Saturdays in Richmond, and every pair of hands makes a difference.

Sign me up Facebook group
every hand makes a
difference ★ join us ★

No skills required

We'll teach you everything on-site. From framing walls to painting murals — there's always a job for every kind of person.

Build real community

Every Saturday is a mix of neighbors, students, faith groups, and first-timers — all working toward the same thing.

See the impact directly

You'll watch a house go up board by board. When move-in day comes, you'll know you helped make it happen.

Sign up

Ready to show up?

Fill out the form and we'll reach out with upcoming build days, advocacy events, and other ways to plug in.

Location
175 23rd St, Richmond, CA 94804
Build day hours
Open 9am – 4pm
Most Saturdays & some Sundays
Confirm before you come
(510) 282-0396
Stay in the loop
Richmond Project Facebook Group

Volunteer sign-up

We'll be in touch shortly after you submit.

Which weekends work for you?
How would you like to get involved?

You're in!

Thanks for signing up. We'll reach out soon with upcoming build days and how to get involved.
